project_type: EMS platform foundation in a single TypeScript repository with a working client and local seed-driven content domain
architecture: Single runtime entry (index.ts -> App.tsx) with UI module in app/mobile and domain/content/permission modules in src
domain: Emergency medical content domain (Algorithm, Medication, Disease, Symptom) with Organization-scoped profile and Content Package controls
status: Foundation transition: working UI and local content pipeline, with partial Organization/Permission/Content Package infrastructure
ui_state: Functional multi-screen mobile UI with navigation, list/detail/search/favorites/settings screens
data_layer: Local JSON seed files validated with Zod, loaded through async loaders, stored in Zustand with AsyncStorage persistence
notes: Repository includes partial Organization-aware content control via ProtocolProfile, ContentBundle (Content Package), and PermissionRule models.
Current default profile setup supports only profile:default; other profiles throw unsupported errors.
BundleManager can hydrate empty default bundle from seed loaders and merge definitions by bundle priority.
Search index is local (FlexSearch) and built at runtime from loaded data.
Legacy agent system exists under .godai/agents with active-with-legacy-import status.
Multiple documentation files contain stale statements that conflict with current code state.
